\tzpentry{ID3514}{Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3514 introduces Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ s(t)=A_1\sin(2\pi f_A' t+\phi_1)+A_2\sin(2\pi f_B' t+\phi_2) + A_3\, g(t)\sin(2\pi f_{\text{bridge}} t+\phi_3)." CL_6699605fd26e,CID_0aa36c885b,1,choose;sigma;small;bridge;narrow;time;topological;seam,,2025-12-12T20:15:22.685742+00:00,2025-12-12T20:15:22.685742+00:00,\]
